summary: Quick-send flow and home tiles testing completed successfully. All 38 backend regression tests pass. Quick-send pages render correctly with proper headers and form fields. Home screen shows all 6 tiles. Event type mapping is correct - Birthday Card logs as birthday_card_sent NOT congrats_card_sent.

issues: Console warning: 'Unexpected text node inside <View>' - cosmetic, does not affect functionality

backend_regression_tests.details: All 38 tests in test_event_types.py passed - validates event type mapping for Birthday, Holiday, Thank You, Welcome, Anniversary, Congrats cards

login_api.details: Returns user data with _id, email, name, role correctly

check_duplicate_api.details: Returns matching contacts array with id, first_name, last_name, phone, email

master_feed_event_labels.details: Returns correct event labels - Holiday Card Sent, Birthday Card Sent, NOT 'Congrats Card Sent' for all card types

fix_event_types_migration.details: Migration endpoint works - fixes wrongly-typed events and titles

home_tiles_render.details: All 6 tiles render: Share My Card, Review Link, Send a Card, My Showcase, Keypad, Add Contact

quick_send_digitalcard.details: Shows 'Share My Card' header, Customer name/Phone/Email fields, Preview button

quick_send_review.details: Shows 'Send Review Link' header with same form fields

quick_send_congrats.details: Shows 'Send a Card' header with card type picker first: Congrats, Birthday, Holiday, Thank You, Anniversary, Welcome

quick_send_showcase.details: Shows 'Share Showcase' header with form fields

add_contact_tile_navigation.details: Add Contact tile navigates directly to /contact/new, not through intermediate modal

keypad_tile.details: Keypad tile opens modal with dial pad (1-9, *, 0, #) and green call button

new_contact_form.details: Form shows: Add Photo, First name, Last name, Phone, Email, Vehicle, Referred by, Notes, Record Voice Note, + Tag, Add Address & Dates

critical_code_review_comments: Console warnings about 'Unexpected text node' in Activity page - cosmetic issue only

success_rate.frontend: 100% (all quick-send pages and home tiles verified)

context_for_next_testing_agent: Quick-send flow verified working: (1) Home tiles route to /quick-send/* pages, (2) Each quick-send page renders with correct header and form fields, (3) /quick-send/congrats shows card type picker first with all 6 card types, (4) Add Contact tile goes directly to /contact/new, (5) Keypad tile opens modal. Event type mapping is centralized and correct - Birthday Card logs as birthday_card_sent.

mocked_apis.Twilio SMS: MOCKED - SMS sends are logged but not delivered
